attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
 peia.expenditure_item_id ,--USG 
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.line_num,
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.creation_date,
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.created_by,
  decode(pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.transfer_status_code,    'B',    'G',    pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.transfer_status_code) transfer_status_code,
  DECODE(PEIA.system_linkage_function,'ST',SIGN(NVL(XAL.accounted_dr, 0) - NVL(XAL.accounted_cr, 0)) * ABS(pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.quantity)) AS HOURS,
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.billable_flag,
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.program_update_date,
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.pa_date,
  dr_gl_code_combinations.code_combination_id dr_code_combination_id,
  xal.accounting_date as gl_date, 
  xal.accounting_date as recvr_gl_date, 
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.reversed_flag,
  pa_projects_all.ORG_ID,--USG
 pa_projects_all.PROJECT_ID,--USG
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.task_id,--USG
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.denom_currency_code,
  0 as denom_raw_cost,
  (CASE WHEN PEIA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE like '__ STAFF WS'  THEN pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.denom_burdened_cost ELSE (CASE WHEN nvl(xal.entered_dr,0) <> 0 THEN xal.entered_dr ELSE -(nvl(xal.entered_cr,0)) END) END) as denom_burdened_cost,
   pa_projects_all.project_currency_code,--USG
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.project_rate_date,
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.project_rate_type,
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.project_exchange_rate,
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.projfunc_cost_exchange_rate,
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.work_type_id,
  --xah.period_name, 
  jeg_get_gl_period(nvl(xal.accounting_date,xah.accounting_date),pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.org_id) recvr_gl_period_name,
  --nvl(pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.recvr_pa_period_name,pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.pa_period_name) recvr_pa_period_name,
  jeg_get_pa_period(nvl(xal.accounting_date,xah.accounting_date),pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.org_id)  recvr_pa_period_name,
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.projfunc_cost_rate_type,
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.projfunc_cost_rate_date,
 pa_projects_all.projfunc_currency_code,--USG
  peia.expenditure_item_date,
   peia.EXPENDITURE_TYPE||jeg_get_iws_rec_project(pa_projects_all.segment1,'L',peia.task_id) expenditure_type,--USG
  nvl(peia.override_to_organization_id, pa_expenditures_all.incurred_by_organization_id) expenditure_organization_id,
  peia.job_id,
  peia.system_linkage_function,
  NULL AS INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,
  (CASE  WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'ST' THEN 'HOURS'
  WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'USG' THEN 'USAGE HOURS'
  WHEN PA_EXPENDITURE_TYPES.UNIT_OF_MEASURE = 'MILEAGE' THEN 'MILEAGE'
  WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'VI' THEN 'DOLLARS'
  ELSE PA_EXPENDITURE_TYPES.UNIT_OF_MEASURE
  END) NEW_UNIT_OF_MEASURE,
  NVL(incurred_by.attribute9,0) as INCURRED_BY_HR_ID,
  pa_expenditures_all.incurred_by_organization_id,
  0 as entered_by,
  pa_expenditures_all.vendor_id,
  pa_implementations_all.period_set_name,
  gl_ledgers.period_set_name,
  NULL AS PROJECT_ROLE_ID,
  null resource_organization_id,
  peia.non_labor_resource,
  (CASE
    WHEN peia.system_linkage_function IN ('ER','PJ','BTC') THEN 'FINANCIAL_ELEMENTS'
    WHEN peia.system_linkage_function IN ('OT','ST') THEN 'PEOPLE'
    WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'INV' THEN 'MATERIAL_ITEMS'
    WHEN peia.SYSTEM_LINKAGE_FUNCTION = 'VI' AND peia.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID IS NOT NULL THEN 'MATERIAL_ITEMS' 
    WHEN peia.SYSTEM_LINKAGE_FUNCTION = 'VI' AND peia.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID IS NULL AND NVL(LT.ORDER_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE,'NA') <> 'RATE' THEN 'FINANCIAL_ELEMENTS' 
    WHEN peia.SYSTEM_LINKAGE_FUNCTION = 'VI' AND peia.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID IS NULL AND LT.ORDER_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE = 'RATE' AND 
    PA_IMPLEMENTATIONS_ALL.XFACE_CWK_TIMECARDS_FLAG='Y' THEN 'PEOPLE' 
    WHEN peia.SYSTEM_LINKAGE_FUNCTION = 'VI' AND 
    peia.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID IS NULL AND LT.ORDER_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE = 'RATE' AND PA_IMPLEMENTATIONS_ALL.XFACE_CWK_TIMECARDS_FLAG = 'N' THEN 'FINANCIAL_ELEMENTS'
    WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'WIP' AND BOM_RESOURCES.RESOURCE_TYPE =  2 THEN 'PEOPLE'
    WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'WIP' AND BOM_RESOURCES.RESOURCE_TYPE =  1 THEN 'EQUIPMENT'
    WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'WIP' AND NVL(BOM_RESOURCES.RESOURCE_TYPE,0) NOT IN (1,2) THEN 'FINANCIAL_ELEMENTS'
    WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'USG' AND PA_NON_LABOR_RESOURCES.EQUIPMENT_RESOURCE_FLAG =  'N' THEN 'FINANCIAL_ELEMENTS'
    WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'USG' AND NVL(PA_NON_LABOR_RESOURCES.EQUIPMENT_RESOURCE_FLAG,'Y') =  'Y' THEN 'EQUIPMENT'
     ELSE ' '
   END) resource_class,  
  peia.wip_resource_id,
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.line_type,
  ABS(peia.raw_cost) * SIGN(NVL(XAL.accounted_dr, 0)- NVL(XAL.accounted_cr, 0)) AS PROJFUNC_RAW_COST,--USG pf_Rawcost
 SIGN(NVL(XAL.accounted_dr, 0) - NVL(XAL.accounted_cr, 0)) * ABS(pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.amount) AS PROJFUNC_BURDENED_COST,--USG pf_burden
  
  ABS(peia.project_raw_cost) * SIGN(NVL(XAL.accounted_dr, 0)- NVL(XAL.accounted_cr, 0)) AS PROJECT_RAW_COST,--USG p_rawcost
  SIGN(NVL(XAL.accounted_dr, 0)  - NVL(XAL.accounted_cr, 0)) * ABS(pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.amount * peia.project_raw_cost/DECODE(peia.raw_cost,0,1,peia.raw_cost)) AS PROJECT_BURDENED_COST,--USG p_burden
  
  peia.raw_cost_rate,
  peia.burden_cost_rate,
  peia.bill_job_id,
  peia.transaction_source,
  PA_PROJECT_TYPES_ALL.PROJECT_TYPE_CLASS_CODE, 
  '0' AS X_CUSTOM,
  peia.attribute8,
  0 as denom_raw_cost,
  peia.cost_burden_distributed_flag,
  peia.bill_hold_flag,
  (CASE WHEN pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.dr_code_combination_id||xal.ae_line_num = MIN(pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.dr_code_combination_id||xal.ae_line_num) OVER( PARTITION BY xdl.source_distribution_id_num_1, xdl.source_distribution_id_num_1 ORDER BY xal.ae_line_num RANGE UNBOUNDED PRECEDING) THEN peia.burden_cost ELSE 0 END) AS BURDEN_COST,
  peia.cost_dist_rejection_code,
  peia.cc_cross_charge_code,
  peia.cc_ic_processed_code,
  peia.bill_job_billing_title,
  peia.attribute2,
  peia.attribute5,
  peia.cc_cross_charge_type,
  JEG_GET_CLASS(pa_projects_all.PROJECT_ID, 'Controlling Performance Unit','C'),
  NULL AS INVOICE_NUM, 
  NULL AS INVOICE_DATE, 
  null as po_num,
  peia.non_labor_resource,
  TRIM(dr_gl_code_combinations.segment3),
  peia.cc_prvdr_organization_id,
  peia.cc_recvr_organization_id,
  TRIM(peia.attribute3),
  gl_ledgers.currency_code as func_currency_code,--USG
NVL(XAL.accounted_dr, 0)- NVL(XAL.accounted_cr, 0) AS FUNC_BURDENED_COST,--USG f_burden
  ABS(peia.acct_raw_cost) * SIGN(NVL(XAL.accounted_dr, 0)- NVL(XAL.accounted_cr, 0)) AS FUNC_RAW_COST,--USG f_Rawcost
  pa_tasks.customer_id,
  xal.ae_line_num,
  'LABOR_COST' as source_type,
  xal.ae_header_id,
  (CASE WHEN PEIA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE like '__ STAFF WS' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END) AS WORKSHARE_FLAG,
  0 AS PRDR_DENOM_RAW_COST,
  (CASE WHEN PEIA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE like '__ STAFF WS' THEN (CASE WHEN nvl(xal.entered_dr,0) <> 0 THEN xal.entered_dr ELSE -(nvl(xal.entered_cr,0)) END) ELSE 0 END) AS PRDR_DENOM_BURDENED_COST,
  0 AS PRDR_FUNC_RAW_COST,
  0 AS PRDR_PROJFUNC_RAW_COST, 
  0 AS PRDR_PROJ_RAW_COST, 
  (CASE WHEN PEIA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE like '__ STAFF WS' THEN (CASE WHEN nvl(xal.accounted_dr,0) <> 0 THEN xal.accounted_dr ELSE -(nvl(xal.accounted_cr,0)) END) ELSE 0 END) AS PRDR_FUNC_BURDENED_COST,
  (CASE WHEN PEIA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE like '__ STAFF WS' THEN (CASE WHEN nvl(xal.accounted_dr,0) <> 0 THEN xal.accounted_dr ELSE -(nvl(xal.accounted_cr,0)) END) ELSE 0 END) * NVL(jeg_get_corporate_rate(pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.acct_currency_code,pa_projects_all.projfunc_currency_code,xal.accounting_date),0) AS PRDR_PROJFUNC_BURDENED_COST, 
  (CASE WHEN PEIA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE like '__ STAFF WS' THEN (CASE WHEN nvl(xal.accounted_dr,0) <> 0 THEN xal.accounted_dr ELSE -(nvl(xal.accounted_cr,0)) END) ELSE 0 END) * NVL(jeg_get_corporate_rate(pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.acct_currency_code,pa_projects_all.project_currency_code,xal.accounting_date),0) AS PRDR_PROJ_BURDENED_COST,
  (CASE WHEN PEIA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE like '__ STAFF WS' THEN PA_COST_DISTRIBUTION_LINES_ALL.ACCT_CURRENCY_CODE ELSE NULL END) AS PRDR_ACCT_CURR_CODE
  ,DECODE(PA_COST_DISTRIBUTION_LINES_ALL.billable_flag,'N',jeg_nonbillable_code('01')) AS non_billable_code1 -- Classfication code P
  ,DECODE(PA_COST_DISTRIBUTION_LINES_ALL.billable_flag,'N',jeg_nonbillable_code('02')) AS non_billable_code2 -- Classfication code R
  ,DECODE(PA_COST_DISTRIBUTION_LINES_ALL.billable_flag,'N',jeg_nonbillable_code('03')) AS non_billable_code3 -- Classfication code W
  ,DECODE(PA_COST_DISTRIBUTION_LINES_ALL.billable_flag,'N',jeg_nonbillable_code('04')) AS non_billable_code4 -- Classfication code C
  ,DECODE(PA_COST_DISTRIBUTION_LINES_ALL.billable_flag,'N',jeg_nonbillable_code('05')) AS non_billable_code5 -- Classfication code X
  ,jeg_pa_nonb_hours(peia.attribute8,jeg_nonbillable_code('01'),SIGN((NVL(xal.accounted_Dr,0) - NVL(xal.accounted_cr,0))),peia.org_id,PA_COST_DISTRIBUTION_LINES_ALL.billable_flag) AS NB1_Hours  -- Classfication Hours P
  ,jeg_pa_nonb_hours(peia.attribute8,jeg_nonbillable_code('02'),SIGN((NVL(xal.accounted_Dr,0) - NVL(xal.accounted_cr,0))),peia.org_id,PA_COST_DISTRIBUTION_LINES_ALL.billable_flag) AS NB2_Hours  -- Classfication Hours R
  ,jeg_pa_nonb_hours(peia.attribute8,jeg_nonbillable_code('03'),SIGN((NVL(xal.accounted_Dr,0) - NVL(xal.accounted_cr,0))),peia.org_id,PA_COST_DISTRIBUTION_LINES_ALL.billable_flag) AS NB3_Hours  -- Classfication Hours W
  ,jeg_pa_nonb_hours(peia.attribute8,jeg_nonbillable_code('04'),SIGN((NVL(xal.accounted_Dr,0) - NVL(xal.accounted_cr,0))),peia.org_id,PA_COST_DISTRIBUTION_LINES_ALL.billable_flag) AS NB4_Hours  -- Classfication Hours C
  ,jeg_pa_nonb_hours(peia.attribute8,jeg_nonbillable_code('05'),SIGN((NVL(xal.accounted_Dr,0) - NVL(xal.accounted_cr,0))),peia.org_id,PA_COST_DISTRIBUTION_LINES_ALL.billable_flag) AS NB5_Hours  -- Classfication Hours X
,CASE WHEN FND_USER.USER_NAME = 'CONVERSION' 
  OR PEIA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE LIKE '%CONVERSION%'
  OR PEIA.EXPENDITURE_TYPE LIKE 'Conv-%'
  OR PEIA.BILL_GROUP LIKE 'CH2M-CONVERSION%' THEN 'CONVERSION' ELSE NULL END AS X_CONVERSION_NAME
  ,PAAF.ASS_ATTRIBUTE3 AS X_ASSIGNED_PU_ID
  ,peia.ORIG_TRANSACTION_REFERENCE AS X_ORIG_TRANS_REFERENCE
	 ,CASE  WHEN INSTR ( peia.attribute8, 'JMC LC') > 1  THEN NEXT_DAY (pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.pa_Date - 1, 'FRIDAY') END as X_CORRECTION_DATE 
,case when xah.gl_transfer_status_code ='Y' THEN xah.gl_transfer_Date END AS X_GL_TRANSFER_DATE
,pa_expenditures_all.expenditure_ending_date as X_EXPENDITURE_END_DATE																																				
																							   
																	  
/* -- (USG columns)
pa_projects_all.ORG_ID prj_org_id
                         ,XAL.LEDGER_ID
                         ,pa_projects_all.PROJECT_ID
                         ,pa_projects_all.segment1 Project_number
                         ,dr_gl_code_combinations.segment1 LE
                         ,dr_gl_code_combinations.segment2 account
                         ,dr_gl_code_combinations.segment3 pu
                         ,dr_gl_code_combinations.segment4 s4
                         ,dr_gl_code_combinations.segment5 s5
                         ,dr_gl_code_combinations.segment6 s6
                         --,peia.expenditure_type
                         --,peia.expenditure_type||DECODE(pa_projects_all.segment1,lc_nb_iws,'++'||peia.task_id)
                         ,peia.EXPENDITURE_TYPE||jeg_get_iws_rec_project(pa_projects_all.segment1,'L',peia.task_id) expenditure_type
                         ,pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.billable_flag billable
                         ,jeg_get_pa_period(xal.accounting_date,ln_org_id)
                         ,jeg_get_gl_period(xal.accounting_date,ln_org_id)
                         --,pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.PA_PERIOD_NAME
                         --,pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.GL_PERIOD_NAME
                         ,SUBSTR(pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.GL_PERIOD_NAME, 5) fiscal_year
                         ,DECODE
                          (
                             SUBSTR(dr_gl_code_combinations.SEGMENT2, 1, 3),
                             399, 'FLOWTHROUGH',
                             499, 'FLOWTHROUGH',
                             PACT.CATEGORY
                          )
                             REPORTING_CATEGORY
                         ,DECODE
                          (
                             SUBSTR(dr_gl_code_combinations.SEGMENT2, 1, 3)
                            ,399
                            ,'FLOWTHROUGH' --PALKP.FIN_REP_CATEGORY
                            ,499
                            ,'FLOWTHROUGH' --PALKP.FIN_REP_CATEGORY
                            ,DECODE
                             (
                                SUBSTR(dr_gl_code_combinations.SEGMENT2, 1, 3),
                                399, 'FLOWTHROUGH',
                                499, 'FLOWTHROUGH',
                                PACT.CATEGORY
                             )
                          )
                             FINANCIAL_REPORTING_CATEGORY
                         ,-- DECODE(peia.system_linkage_function,'USG',pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.quantity * sign(NVL(XAL.accounted_dr,0)- NVL(XAL.accounted_cr,0))) hours,
                          0 HOURS
                         , ABS(peia.raw_cost) * SIGN(NVL(XAL.accounted_dr, 0)- NVL(XAL.accounted_cr, 0)) pf_Rawcost
                         , ABS(peia.acct_raw_cost) * SIGN(NVL(XAL.accounted_dr, 0)- NVL(XAL.accounted_cr, 0)) f_Rawcost
                         , SIGN(NVL(XAL.accounted_dr, 0) - NVL(XAL.accounted_cr, 0)) * ABS(pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.amount) pf_burden
                         , NVL(XAL.accounted_dr, 0)- NVL(XAL.accounted_cr, 0) f_burden
                         , ABS(peia.project_raw_cost) * SIGN(NVL(XAL.accounted_dr, 0)- NVL(XAL.accounted_cr, 0)) p_Rawcost
                         ,SIGN(NVL(XAL.accounted_dr, 0)  - NVL(XAL.accounted_cr, 0)) * ABS(pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.amount * peia.project_raw_cost/DECODE(peia.raw_cost,0,1,peia.raw_cost))  p_burden
                         ,gl_ledgers.currency_code
                         ,'COST' record_type
                         ,pa_projects_all.project_currency_code
                         ,pa_projects_all.projfunc_currency_code
                         ,'LABOR DIST' lr3_type
                         ,peia.org_id exp_org_id
                         ,peia.expenditure_item_id
                         ,DECODE(SUBSTR(transaction_source,1,2),'IN',NULL,peia.attribute4) work_location
                         ,pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.task_id
						 
						 */
						 
                   FROM   xla_distribution_links XDL
                         ,xla_ae_lines XAL
                         ,xla_ae_headers XAH
                         ,pa_cost_distribution_lines_all pa_cost_distribution_lines_all
                         ,pa_expenditure_items_all peia
                         ,pa_projects_all pa_projects_all
                         ,gl_ledgers gl_ledgers
                         ,gl_code_combinations dr_gl_code_combinations
                         --,JEG_PA_AUTO_ACCT_LKP_SET_V PALKP
                         ,JEG_PA_ACCT_CATEGORIES PACT
						 
						  /*Newly added tables*/
						 ,pa_expenditures_all
						 ,per_all_people_f incurred_by
						 ,pa_implementations_all
						 ,PA_PROJECT_TYPES_ALL
						 ,PA_EXPENDITURE_TYPES
						 ,PA_NON_LABOR_RESOURCES
						 ,BOM_RESOURCES
						 ,PO_LINES_ALL  POL
						 ,PO_LINE_TYPES_B LT
						 ,pa_tasks
						 ,FND_USER
						 ,PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F PAAF
						 

   
																																		   
																																										  
																																									 
																							   
   
                   WHERE  XAH.event_type_code IN ('TOT_BURDENED_COST_DIST'
                                ,'TOT_BURDENED_COST_DIST_ADJ')
                   AND    peia.transaction_source = 'FA_DEPREN'
                   /*AND    XAH.ae_header_id IN
                          ( SELECT XLAGT.ae_header_id
                            FROM   jeg_lr3_xla_ids_gtt XLAGT
                          )*/
                      AND XAH.ae_header_id = XDL.ae_headeR_id
                      AND XDL.ae_headeR_id = XAL.ae_header_id
					  AND FND_USER.USER_ID(+) = peia.CREATED_BY
                      AND XDL.ae_line_num = XAL.ae_line_num
                      --AND TRUNC(XAL.CREATION_DATE) BETWEEN TRUNC(l_last_completion_Date)
                      --                                 AND  TRUNC(SYSDATE)
                      --AND peia.org_id = p_org_id
                      AND XDL.source_distribution_id_num_1 =
                             pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.expenditure_item_id
                      AND XDL.source_distribution_id_num_2 = pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.line_num
                      AND (pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.line_type = 'D'
                       AND peia.system_linkage_function = 'USG')
                      AND XAL.accounting_class_code = 'COST'
                      AND pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.expenditure_item_id = peia.expenditure_item_id
                      AND peia.project_id = pa_projects_all.project_id
                      AND XAL.ledger_id = gl_ledgers.ledger_id
                      --AND   XAL.code_combination_id = dr_gl_code_combinations.code_combination_id
                      --AND 'EType||SType Sup Inv Rev DIR' =
                      --       PALKP.segment_Value_lookup_set_name(+)
                      --AND peia.EXPENDITURE_ITEM_ID =
                      --       PALKP.expenditure_item_id(+)
                      AND gl_ledgers.LEDGER_CATEGORY_CODE = 'PRIMARY'
                      AND dr_gl_code_combinations.SEGMENT2 BETWEEN PACT.ACCOUNT_FROM(+)
                                           AND  PACT.ACCOUNT_TO(+)
                      AND PACT.TYPE(+) IS NOT NULL
                      AND dr_gl_code_combinations.code_combination_id = XAL.code_combination_id

					  		  /*Newly added joins*/
					  AND peia.expenditure_id = pa_expenditures_all.expenditure_id
					  AND pa_expenditures_all.incurred_by_person_id = incurred_by.person_id (+)
  AND trunc(pa_expenditures_all.creation_date) <= trunc(incurred_by.effective_end_date (+))
  AND trunc(pa_expenditures_all.creation_date) >= trunc(incurred_by.effective_start_date (+))
  				  AND pa_expenditures_all.incurred_by_person_id = PAAF.person_id (+)
  AND trunc(pa_expenditures_all.creation_date) <= trunc(PAAF.effective_end_date (+))
  AND trunc(pa_expenditures_all.creation_date) >= trunc(PAAF.effective_start_date (+))
   AND pa_implementations_all.org_id = pa_projects_all.org_id
    AND PA_PROJECTS_ALL.PROJECT_TYPE = PA_PROJECT_TYPES_ALL.PROJECT_TYPE 
  AND PA_PROJECTS_ALL.ORG_ID = PA_PROJECT_TYPES_ALL.ORG_ID
 AND peia.EXPENDITURE_TYPE = PA_EXPENDITURE_TYPES.EXPENDITURE_TYPE 
AND peia.non_labor_resource = PA_NON_LABOR_RESOURCES.non_labor_resource (+)
AND peia.wip_resource_id = BOM_RESOURCES.resource_id (+)
AND peia.PO_LINE_ID  = POL.PO_LINE_ID     (+)      
  AND POL.LINE_TYPE_ID = LT.LINE_TYPE_ID (+)
  AND peia.task_id = pa_tasks.task_id (+)
AND XAL.ACCOUNTING_DATE >= to_date('10/01/2016', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS')
  AND ( XAH.LAST_UPDATE_DATE >=  to_date('$$MV_LAST_EXTRACT_DATE', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS')
  OR peia.LAST_UPDATE_DATE >=  to_date('$$MV_LAST_EXTRACT_DATE', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS'))
  --AND pa_projects_all.SEGMENT1 NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT PROJECT_NUMBER FROM ($$X_DIVESTCO_SQL)) --Added for Divestiture logic for ECR
  AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM ($$X_DIVESTCO_SQL) SQ WHERE SQ.PROJECT_NUMBER = pa_projects_all.SEGMENT1 )--Added for Divestiture logic.*/

SELECT 
 peia.expenditure_item_id ,--USG 
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.line_num,
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.creation_date,
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.created_by,
  decode(pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.transfer_status_code,    'B',    'G',    pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.transfer_status_code) transfer_status_code,
  DECODE(PEIA.system_linkage_function,'ST',SIGN(NVL(XAL.accounted_dr, 0) - NVL(XAL.accounted_cr, 0)) * ABS(pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.quantity)) AS HOURS,
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.billable_flag,
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.program_update_date,
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.pa_date,
  dr_gl_code_combinations.code_combination_id dr_code_combination_id,
  xal.accounting_date as gl_date, 
  xal.accounting_date as recvr_gl_date, 
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.reversed_flag,
  pa_projects_all.ORG_ID,--USG
 pa_projects_all.PROJECT_ID,--USG
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.task_id,--USG
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.denom_currency_code,
  0 as denom_raw_cost,
  (CASE WHEN PEIA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE like '__ STAFF WS'  THEN pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.denom_burdened_cost ELSE (CASE WHEN nvl(xal.entered_dr,0) <> 0 THEN xal.entered_dr ELSE -(nvl(xal.entered_cr,0)) END) END) as denom_burdened_cost,
   pa_projects_all.project_currency_code,--USG
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.project_rate_date,
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.project_rate_type,
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.project_exchange_rate,
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.projfunc_cost_exchange_rate,
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.work_type_id,
  --xah.period_name, 
  jeg_get_gl_period(nvl(xal.accounting_date,xah.accounting_date),pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.org_id) recvr_gl_period_name,
  --nvl(pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.recvr_pa_period_name,pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.pa_period_name) recvr_pa_period_name,
  jeg_get_pa_period(nvl(xal.accounting_date,xah.accounting_date),pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.org_id)  recvr_pa_period_name,
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.projfunc_cost_rate_type,
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.projfunc_cost_rate_date,
 pa_projects_all.projfunc_currency_code,--USG
  peia.expenditure_item_date,
   peia.EXPENDITURE_TYPE||jeg_get_iws_rec_project(pa_projects_all.segment1,'L',peia.task_id) expenditure_type,--USG
  nvl(peia.override_to_organization_id, pa_expenditures_all.incurred_by_organization_id) expenditure_organization_id,
  peia.job_id,
  peia.system_linkage_function,
  NULL AS INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,
  (CASE  WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'ST' THEN 'HOURS'
  WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'USG' THEN 'USAGE HOURS'
  WHEN PA_EXPENDITURE_TYPES.UNIT_OF_MEASURE = 'MILEAGE' THEN 'MILEAGE'
  WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'VI' THEN 'DOLLARS'
  ELSE PA_EXPENDITURE_TYPES.UNIT_OF_MEASURE
  END) NEW_UNIT_OF_MEASURE,
  NVL(incurred_by.attribute9,0) as INCURRED_BY_HR_ID,
  pa_expenditures_all.incurred_by_organization_id,
  0 as entered_by,
  pa_expenditures_all.vendor_id,
  pa_implementations_all.period_set_name,
  gl_ledgers.period_set_name,
  NULL AS PROJECT_ROLE_ID,
  null resource_organization_id,
  peia.non_labor_resource,
  (CASE
    WHEN peia.system_linkage_function IN ('ER','PJ','BTC') THEN 'FINANCIAL_ELEMENTS'
    WHEN peia.system_linkage_function IN ('OT','ST') THEN 'PEOPLE'
    WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'INV' THEN 'MATERIAL_ITEMS'
    WHEN peia.SYSTEM_LINKAGE_FUNCTION = 'VI' AND peia.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID IS NOT NULL THEN 'MATERIAL_ITEMS' 
    WHEN peia.SYSTEM_LINKAGE_FUNCTION = 'VI' AND peia.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID IS NULL AND NVL(LT.ORDER_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE,'NA') <> 'RATE' THEN 'FINANCIAL_ELEMENTS' 
    WHEN peia.SYSTEM_LINKAGE_FUNCTION = 'VI' AND peia.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID IS NULL AND LT.ORDER_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE = 'RATE' AND 
    PA_IMPLEMENTATIONS_ALL.XFACE_CWK_TIMECARDS_FLAG='Y' THEN 'PEOPLE' 
    WHEN peia.SYSTEM_LINKAGE_FUNCTION = 'VI' AND 
    peia.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID IS NULL AND LT.ORDER_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE = 'RATE' AND PA_IMPLEMENTATIONS_ALL.XFACE_CWK_TIMECARDS_FLAG = 'N' THEN 'FINANCIAL_ELEMENTS'
    WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'WIP' AND BOM_RESOURCES.RESOURCE_TYPE =  2 THEN 'PEOPLE'
    WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'WIP' AND BOM_RESOURCES.RESOURCE_TYPE =  1 THEN 'EQUIPMENT'
    WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'WIP' AND NVL(BOM_RESOURCES.RESOURCE_TYPE,0) NOT IN (1,2) THEN 'FINANCIAL_ELEMENTS'
    WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'USG' AND PA_NON_LABOR_RESOURCES.EQUIPMENT_RESOURCE_FLAG =  'N' THEN 'FINANCIAL_ELEMENTS'
    WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'USG' AND NVL(PA_NON_LABOR_RESOURCES.EQUIPMENT_RESOURCE_FLAG,'Y') =  'Y' THEN 'EQUIPMENT'
     ELSE ' '
   END) resource_class,  
  peia.wip_resource_id,
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.line_type,
  ABS(peia.raw_cost) * SIGN(NVL(XAL.accounted_dr, 0)- NVL(XAL.accounted_cr, 0)) AS PROJFUNC_RAW_COST,--USG pf_Rawcost
 SIGN(NVL(XAL.accounted_dr, 0) - NVL(XAL.accounted_cr, 0)) * ABS(pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.amount) AS PROJFUNC_BURDENED_COST,--USG pf_burden
  
  ABS(peia.project_raw_cost) * SIGN(NVL(XAL.accounted_dr, 0)- NVL(XAL.accounted_cr, 0)) AS PROJECT_RAW_COST,--USG p_rawcost
  SIGN(NVL(XAL.accounted_dr, 0)  - NVL(XAL.accounted_cr, 0)) * ABS(pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.amount * peia.project_raw_cost/DECODE(peia.raw_cost,0,1,peia.raw_cost)) AS PROJECT_BURDENED_COST,--USG p_burden
  
  peia.raw_cost_rate,
  peia.burden_cost_rate,
  peia.bill_job_id,
  peia.transaction_source,
  PA_PROJECT_TYPES_ALL.PROJECT_TYPE_CLASS_CODE,

  gl_ledgers.currency_code as func_currency_code,--USG
NVL(XAL.accounted_dr, 0)- NVL(XAL.accounted_cr, 0) AS FUNC_BURDENED_COST,--USG f_burden

  (CASE WHEN PEIA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE like '__ STAFF WS' THEN (CASE WHEN nvl(xal.entered_dr,0) <> 0 THEN xal.entered_dr ELSE -(nvl(xal.entered_cr,0)) END) ELSE 0 END) AS PRDR_DENOM_BURDENED_COST,
  0 AS PRDR_FUNC_RAW_COST,
  0 AS PRDR_PROJFUNC_RAW_COST, 
  0 AS PRDR_PROJ_RAW_COST, 
  (CASE WHEN PEIA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE like '__ STAFF WS' THEN (CASE WHEN nvl(xal.accounted_dr,0) <> 0 THEN xal.accounted_dr ELSE -(nvl(xal.accounted_cr,0)) END) ELSE 0 END) AS PRDR_FUNC_BURDENED_COST,
  (CASE WHEN PEIA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE like '__ STAFF WS' THEN (CASE WHEN nvl(xal.accounted_dr,0) <> 0 THEN xal.accounted_dr ELSE -(nvl(xal.accounted_cr,0)) END) ELSE 0 END) * NVL(jeg_get_corporate_rate(pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.acct_currency_code,pa_projects_all.projfunc_currency_code,xal.accounting_date),0) AS PRDR_PROJFUNC_BURDENED_COST, 
  (CASE WHEN PEIA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE like '__ STAFF WS' THEN (CASE WHEN nvl(xal.accounted_dr,0) <> 0 THEN xal.accounted_dr ELSE -(nvl(xal.accounted_cr,0)) END) ELSE 0 END) * NVL(jeg_get_corporate_rate(pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.acct_currency_code,pa_projects_all.project_currency_code,xal.accounting_date),0) AS PRDR_PROJ_BURDENED_COST,
  (CASE WHEN PEIA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE like '__ STAFF WS' THEN PA_COST_DISTRIBUTION_LINES_ALL.ACCT_CURRENCY_CODE ELSE NULL END) AS PRDR_ACCT_CURR_CODE
  ,DECODE(PA_COST_DISTRIBUTION_LINES_ALL.billable_flag,'N',jeg_nonbillable_code('01')) AS non_billable_code1 -- Classfication code P
  ,DECODE(PA_COST_DISTRIBUTION_LINES_ALL.billable_flag,'N',jeg_nonbillable_code('02')) AS non_billable_code2 -- Classfication code R
  ,DECODE(PA_COST_DISTRIBUTION_LINES_ALL.billable_flag,'N',jeg_nonbillable_code('03')) AS non_billable_code3 -- Classfication code W
  ,DECODE(PA_COST_DISTRIBUTION_LINES_ALL.billable_flag,'N',jeg_nonbillable_code('04')) AS non_billable_code4 -- Classfication code C
  ,DECODE(PA_COST_DISTRIBUTION_LINES_ALL.billable_flag,'N',jeg_nonbillable_code('05')) AS non_billable_code5 -- Classfication code X
  ,jeg_pa_nonb_hours(peia.attribute8,jeg_nonbillable_code('01'),SIGN((NVL(xal.accounted_Dr,0) - NVL(xal.accounted_cr,0))),peia.org_id,PA_COST_DISTRIBUTION_LINES_ALL.billable_flag) AS NB1_Hours  -- Classfication Hours P
  ,jeg_pa_nonb_hours(peia.attribute8,jeg_nonbillable_code('02'),SIGN((NVL(xal.accounted_Dr,0) - NVL(xal.accounted_cr,0))),peia.org_id,PA_COST_DISTRIBUTION_LINES_ALL.billable_flag) AS NB2_Hours  -- Classfication Hours R
  ,jeg_pa_nonb_hours(peia.attribute8,jeg_nonbillable_code('03'),SIGN((NVL(xal.accounted_Dr,0) - NVL(xal.accounted_cr,0))),peia.org_id,PA_COST_DISTRIBUTION_LINES_ALL.billable_flag) AS NB3_Hours  -- Classfication Hours W
  ,jeg_pa_nonb_hours(peia.attribute8,jeg_nonbillable_code('04'),SIGN((NVL(xal.accounted_Dr,0) - NVL(xal.accounted_cr,0))),peia.org_id,PA_COST_DISTRIBUTION_LINES_ALL.billable_flag) AS NB4_Hours  -- Classfication Hours C
  ,jeg_pa_nonb_hours(peia.attribute8,jeg_nonbillable_code('05'),SIGN((NVL(xal.accounted_Dr,0) - NVL(xal.accounted_cr,0))),peia.org_id,PA_COST_DISTRIBUTION_LINES_ALL.billable_flag) AS NB5_Hours  -- Classfication Hours X
,CASE WHEN FND_USER.USER_NAME = 'CONVERSION' 
  OR PEIA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE LIKE '%CONVERSION%'
  OR PEIA.EXPENDITURE_TYPE LIKE 'Conv-%'
  OR PEIA.BILL_GROUP LIKE 'CH2M-CONVERSION%' THEN 'CONVERSION' ELSE NULL END AS X_CONVERSION_NAME
  ,PAAF.ASS_ATTRIBUTE3 AS X_ASSIGNED_PU_ID
  ,peia.ORIG_TRANSACTION_REFERENCE AS X_ORIG_TRANS_REFERENCE
	 ,CASE  WHEN INSTR ( peia.attribute8, 'JMC LC') > 1  THEN NEXT_DAY (pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.pa_Date - 1, 'FRIDAY') END as X_CORRECTION_DATE 
,case when xah.gl_transfer_status_code ='Y' THEN xah.gl_transfer_Date END AS X_GL_TRANSFER_DATE
,pa_expenditures_all.expenditure_ending_date as X_EXPENDITURE_END_DATE																																				
																							   
																	  
/* -- (USG columns)
pa_projects_all.ORG_ID prj_org_id
                         ,XAL.LEDGER_ID
                         ,pa_projects_all.PROJECT_ID
                         ,pa_projects_all.segment1 Project_number
                         ,dr_gl_code_combinations.segment1 LE
                         ,dr_gl_code_combinations.segment2 account
                         ,dr_gl_code_combinations.segment3 pu
                         ,dr_gl_code_combinations.segment4 s4
                         ,dr_gl_code_combinations.segment5 s5
                         ,dr_gl_code_combinations.segment6 s6
                         --,peia.expenditure_type
                         --,peia.expenditure_type||DECODE(pa_projects_all.segment1,lc_nb_iws,'++'||peia.task_id)
                         ,peia.EXPENDITURE_TYPE||jeg_get_iws_rec_project(pa_projects_all.segment1,'L',peia.task_id) expenditure_type
                         ,pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.billable_flag billable
                         ,jeg_get_pa_period(xal.accounting_date,ln_org_id)
                         ,jeg_get_gl_period(xal.accounting_date,ln_org_id)
                         --,pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.PA_PERIOD_NAME
                         --,pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.GL_PERIOD_NAME
                         ,SUBSTR(pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.GL_PERIOD_NAME, 5) fiscal_year
                         ,DECODE
                          (
                             SUBSTR(dr_gl_code_combinations.SEGMENT2, 1, 3),
                             399, 'FLOWTHROUGH',
                             499, 'FLOWTHROUGH',
                             PACT.CATEGORY
                          )
                             REPORTING_CATEGORY
                         ,DECODE
                          (
                             SUBSTR(dr_gl_code_combinations.SEGMENT2, 1, 3)
                            ,399
                            ,'FLOWTHROUGH' --PALKP.FIN_REP_CATEGORY
                            ,499
                            ,'FLOWTHROUGH' --PALKP.FIN_REP_CATEGORY
                            ,DECODE
                             (
                                SUBSTR(dr_gl_code_combinations.SEGMENT2, 1, 3),
                                399, 'FLOWTHROUGH',
                                499, 'FLOWTHROUGH',
                                PACT.CATEGORY
                             )
                          )
                             FINANCIAL_REPORTING_CATEGORY
                         ,-- DECODE(peia.system_linkage_function,'USG',pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.quantity * sign(NVL(XAL.accounted_dr,0)- NVL(XAL.accounted_cr,0))) hours,
                          0 HOURS
                         , ABS(peia.raw_cost) * SIGN(NVL(XAL.accounted_dr, 0)- NVL(XAL.accounted_cr, 0)) pf_Rawcost
                         , ABS(peia.acct_raw_cost) * SIGN(NVL(XAL.accounted_dr, 0)- NVL(XAL.accounted_cr, 0)) f_Rawcost
                         , SIGN(NVL(XAL.accounted_dr, 0) - NVL(XAL.accounted_cr, 0)) * ABS(pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.amount) pf_burden
                         , NVL(XAL.accounted_dr, 0)- NVL(XAL.accounted_cr, 0) f_burden
                         , ABS(peia.project_raw_cost) * SIGN(NVL(XAL.accounted_dr, 0)- NVL(XAL.accounted_cr, 0)) p_Rawcost
                         ,SIGN(NVL(XAL.accounted_dr, 0)  - NVL(XAL.accounted_cr, 0)) * ABS(pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.amount * peia.project_raw_cost/DECODE(peia.raw_cost,0,1,peia.raw_cost))  p_burden
                         ,gl_ledgers.currency_code
                         ,'COST' record_type
                         ,pa_projects_all.project_currency_code
                         ,pa_projects_all.projfunc_currency_code
                         ,'LABOR DIST' lr3_type
                         ,peia.org_id exp_org_id
                         ,peia.expenditure_item_id
                         ,DECODE(SUBSTR(transaction_source,1,2),'IN',NULL,peia.attribute4) work_location
                         ,pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.task_id
						 
						 */
						 
                   FROM   xla_distribution_links XDL
                         ,xla_ae_lines XAL
                         ,xla_ae_headers XAH
                         ,pa_cost_distribution_lines_all pa_cost_distribution_lines_all
                         ,pa_expenditure_items_all peia
                         ,pa_projects_all pa_projects_all
                         ,gl_ledgers gl_ledgers
                         ,gl_code_combinations dr_gl_code_combinations
                         --,JEG_PA_AUTO_ACCT_LKP_SET_V PALKP
                         ,JEG_PA_ACCT_CATEGORIES PACT
						 
						  /*Newly added tables*/
						 ,pa_expenditures_all
						 ,per_all_people_f incurred_by
						 ,pa_implementations_all
						 ,PA_PROJECT_TYPES_ALL
						 ,PA_EXPENDITURE_TYPES
						 ,PA_NON_LABOR_RESOURCES
						 ,BOM_RESOURCES
						 ,PO_LINES_ALL  POL
						 ,PO_LINE_TYPES_B LT
						 ,pa_tasks
						 ,FND_USER
						 ,PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F PAAF
						 

   
																																		   
																																										  
																																									 
																							   
   
                   WHERE  XAH.event_type_code IN ('TOT_BURDENED_COST_DIST'
                                ,'TOT_BURDENED_COST_DIST_ADJ')
                   AND    peia.transaction_source = 'FA_DEPREN'
                   /*AND    XAH.ae_header_id IN
                          ( SELECT XLAGT.ae_header_id
                            FROM   jeg_lr3_xla_ids_gtt XLAGT
                          )*/
                      AND XAH.ae_header_id = XDL.ae_headeR_id
                      AND XDL.ae_headeR_id = XAL.ae_header_id
					  AND FND_USER.USER_ID(+) = peia.CREATED_BY
                      AND XDL.ae_line_num = XAL.ae_line_num
                      --AND TRUNC(XAL.CREATION_DATE) BETWEEN TRUNC(l_last_completion_Date)
                      --                                 AND  TRUNC(SYSDATE)
                      --AND peia.org_id = p_org_id
                      AND XDL.source_distribution_id_num_1 =
                             pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.expenditure_item_id
                      AND XDL.source_distribution_id_num_2 = pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.line_num
                      AND (pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.line_type = 'D'
                       AND peia.system_linkage_function = 'USG')
                      AND XAL.accounting_class_code = 'COST'
                      AND pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.expenditure_item_id = peia.expenditure_item_id
                      AND peia.project_id = pa_projects_all.project_id
                      AND XAL.ledger_id = gl_ledgers.ledger_id
                      --AND   XAL.code_combination_id = dr_gl_code_combinations.code_combination_id
                      --AND 'EType||SType Sup Inv Rev DIR' =
                      --       PALKP.segment_Value_lookup_set_name(+)
                      --AND peia.EXPENDITURE_ITEM_ID =
                      --       PALKP.expenditure_item_id(+)
                      AND gl_ledgers.LEDGER_CATEGORY_CODE = 'PRIMARY'
                      AND dr_gl_code_combinations.SEGMENT2 BETWEEN PACT.ACCOUNT_FROM(+)
                                           AND  PACT.ACCOUNT_TO(+)
                      AND PACT.TYPE(+) IS NOT NULL
                      AND dr_gl_code_combinations.code_combination_id = XAL.code_combination_id

					  		  /*Newly added joins*/
					  AND peia.expenditure_id = pa_expenditures_all.expenditure_id
					  AND pa_expenditures_all.incurred_by_person_id = incurred_by.person_id (+)
  AND trunc(pa_expenditures_all.creation_date) <= trunc(incurred_by.effective_end_date (+))
  AND trunc(pa_expenditures_all.creation_date) >= trunc(incurred_by.effective_start_date (+))
  				  AND pa_expenditures_all.incurred_by_person_id = PAAF.person_id (+)
  AND trunc(pa_expenditures_all.creation_date) <= trunc(PAAF.effective_end_date (+))
  AND trunc(pa_expenditures_all.creation_date) >= trunc(PAAF.effective_start_date (+))
   AND pa_implementations_all.org_id = pa_projects_all.org_id
    AND PA_PROJECTS_ALL.PROJECT_TYPE = PA_PROJECT_TYPES_ALL.PROJECT_TYPE 
  AND PA_PROJECTS_ALL.ORG_ID = PA_PROJECT_TYPES_ALL.ORG_ID
 AND peia.EXPENDITURE_TYPE = PA_EXPENDITURE_TYPES.EXPENDITURE_TYPE 
AND peia.non_labor_resource = PA_NON_LABOR_RESOURCES.non_labor_resource (+)
AND peia.wip_resource_id = BOM_RESOURCES.resource_id (+)
AND peia.PO_LINE_ID  = POL.PO_LINE_ID     (+)      
  AND POL.LINE_TYPE_ID = LT.LINE_TYPE_ID (+)
  AND peia.task_id = pa_tasks.task_id (+)
AND XAL.ACCOUNTING_DATE >= to_date('10/01/2016', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS')
  AND ( XAH.LAST_UPDATE_DATE >=  to_date('$$MV_LAST_EXTRACT_DATE', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS')
  OR peia.LAST_UPDATE_DATE >=  to_date('$$MV_LAST_EXTRACT_DATE', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS'))
  --AND pa_projects_all.SEGMENT1 NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT PROJECT_NUMBER FROM ($$X_DIVESTCO_SQL)) --Added for Divestiture logic for ECR
  AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM ($$X_DIVESTCO_SQL) SQ WHERE SQ.PROJECT_NUMBER = pa_projects_all.SEGMENT1 )--Added for Divestiture logic.*/

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT  peia.expenditure_item_id,--USG
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.line_num,
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.creation_date,
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.created_by,
  DECODE(pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.transfer_status_code,'B','G', pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.transfer_status_code) transfer_status_code,
  0 AS quantity,
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.billable_flag,
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.program_update_date,
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.pa_date,
  dr_gl_code_combinations.code_combination_id dr_code_combination_id,
  xal.accounting_date AS gl_date,
  xal.accounting_date AS recvr_gl_date,
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.reversed_flag,
  pa_projects_all.ORG_ID prj_org_id,     --USG
  pa_projects_all.PROJECT_ID,            --USG
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.task_id,--USG
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.denom_currency_code,
  (
  CASE
    WHEN PEIA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE LIKE '__ STAFF WS'
    THEN pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.denom_raw_cost
    ELSE (
      CASE
        WHEN NVL(xal.entered_dr,0) <> 0
        THEN xal.entered_dr
        ELSE -(NVL(xal.entered_cr,0))
      END)
  END) AS denom_raw_cost,
  0    AS DENOM_BURDENED_COST,
  pa_projects_all.project_currency_code,--USG
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.project_rate_date,
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.project_rate_type,
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.project_exchange_rate,
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.projfunc_cost_exchange_rate,
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.work_type_id,
  --xah.period_name,
  jeg_get_gl_period(NVL(xal.accounting_date,xah.accounting_date),pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.org_id) recvr_gl_period_name,
  --nvl(pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.recvr_pa_period_name,pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.pa_period_name) recvr_pa_period_name,
  jeg_get_pa_period(NVL(xal.accounting_date,xah.accounting_date),pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.org_id) recvr_pa_period_name,
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.projfunc_cost_rate_type,
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.projfunc_cost_rate_date,
  pa_projects_all.projfunc_currency_code,--USG
  peia.expenditure_item_date,
  peia.EXPENDITURE_TYPE
  ||jeg_get_iws_rec_project(pa_projects_all.segment1,'L',peia.task_id) expenditure_type,--USG
  NVL(peia.override_to_organization_id, pa_expenditures_all.incurred_by_organization_id) expenditure_organization_id,
  peia.job_id,
  peia.system_linkage_function,
  NULL AS INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,
  (
  CASE
    WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'ST'
    THEN 'HOURS'
    WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'USG'
    THEN 'USAGE HOURS'
    WHEN PA_EXPENDITURE_TYPES.UNIT_OF_MEASURE = 'MILEAGE'
    THEN 'MILEAGE'
    WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'VI'
    THEN 'DOLLARS'
    ELSE PA_EXPENDITURE_TYPES.UNIT_OF_MEASURE
  END) NEW_UNIT_OF_MEASURE,
  NVL(incurred_by.attribute9,0) AS INCURRED_BY_HR_ID,
  pa_expenditures_all.incurred_by_organization_id,
  0 AS entered_by,
  pa_expenditures_all.vendor_id,
  pa_implementations_all.period_set_name,
  gl_ledgers.period_set_name,
  NULL AS PROJECT_ROLE_ID,
  NULL resource_organization_id,
  peia.non_labor_resource,
  (
  CASE
    WHEN peia.system_linkage_function IN ('ER','PJ','BTC')
    THEN 'FINANCIAL_ELEMENTS'
    WHEN peia.system_linkage_function IN ('OT','ST')
    THEN 'PEOPLE'
    WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'INV'
    THEN 'MATERIAL_ITEMS'
    WHEN peia.SYSTEM_LINKAGE_FUNCTION = 'VI'
    AND peia.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID       IS NOT NULL
    THEN 'MATERIAL_ITEMS'
    WHEN peia.SYSTEM_LINKAGE_FUNCTION        = 'VI'
    AND peia.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID              IS NULL
    AND NVL(LT.ORDER_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE,'NA') <> 'RATE'
    THEN 'FINANCIAL_ELEMENTS'
    WHEN peia.SYSTEM_LINKAGE_FUNCTION                  = 'VI'
    AND peia.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID                        IS NULL
    AND LT.ORDER_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE                      = 'RATE'
    AND PA_IMPLEMENTATIONS_ALL.XFACE_CWK_TIMECARDS_FLAG='Y'
    THEN 'PEOPLE'
    WHEN peia.SYSTEM_LINKAGE_FUNCTION                   = 'VI'
    AND peia.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID                         IS NULL
    AND LT.ORDER_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE                       = 'RATE'
    AND PA_IMPLEMENTATIONS_ALL.XFACE_CWK_TIMECARDS_FLAG = 'N'
    THEN 'FINANCIAL_ELEMENTS'
    WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'WIP'
    AND BOM_RESOURCES.RESOURCE_TYPE   = 2
    THEN 'PEOPLE'
    WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'WIP'
    AND BOM_RESOURCES.RESOURCE_TYPE   = 1
    THEN 'EQUIPMENT'
    WHEN peia.system_linkage_function           = 'WIP'
    AND NVL(BOM_RESOURCES.RESOURCE_TYPE,0) NOT IN (1,2)
    THEN 'FINANCIAL_ELEMENTS'
    WHEN peia.system_linkage_function                  = 'USG'
    AND PA_NON_LABOR_RESOURCES.EQUIPMENT_RESOURCE_FLAG = 'N'
    THEN 'FINANCIAL_ELEMENTS'
    WHEN peia.system_linkage_function                           = 'USG'
    AND NVL(PA_NON_LABOR_RESOURCES.EQUIPMENT_RESOURCE_FLAG,'Y') = 'Y'
    THEN 'EQUIPMENT'
    ELSE ' '
  END) resource_class,
  peia.wip_resource_id,
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.line_type,
  DECODE ( peia.system_linkage_function ,'USG' ,ABS(pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.amount)           * SIGN(NVL(XAL.accounted_dr, 0) - NVL(XAL.accounted_cr, 0)) )                                                               AS PROJFUNC_RAW_COST,     --USG pf_Rawcost
  SIGN(NVL(XAL.accounted_dr, 0)                                                                      - NVL(XAL.accounted_cr, 0)) * ABS(pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.amount)                                                    AS PROJFUNC_BURDENED_COST,--USG pf_burden
  DECODE ( peia.system_linkage_function ,'USG' ,ABS(pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.project_raw_cost) * SIGN(NVL(XAL.accounted_dr, 0) - NVL(XAL.accounted_cr, 0)) )                                                               AS PROJECT_RAW_COST,      --USG p_rawcost
  SIGN(NVL(XAL.accounted_dr, 0)                                                                      - NVL(XAL.accounted_cr, 0)) * ABS(NVL ( pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.project_burdened_cost ,peia.project_burdened_cost )) AS PROJECT_BURDENED_COST, --USG p_burden
  peia.raw_cost_rate,
  peia.burden_cost_rate,
  peia.bill_job_id,
  peia.transaction_source,
  PA_PROJECT_TYPES_ALL.PROJECT_TYPE_CLASS_CODE,
  '0' AS X_CUSTOM,
  peia.attribute8,
  (
  CASE
    WHEN NVL(xal.entered_dr,0) <> 0
    THEN xal.entered_dr
    ELSE -(NVL(xal.entered_cr,0))
  END) AS denom_raw_cost,
  peia.cost_burden_distributed_flag,
  peia.bill_hold_flag,
  0 AS BURDEN_COST,
  peia.cost_dist_rejection_code,
  peia.cc_cross_charge_code,
  peia.cc_ic_processed_code,
  peia.bill_job_billing_title,
  peia.attribute2,
  peia.attribute5,
  peia.cc_cross_charge_type,
  JEG_GET_CLASS(pa_projects_all.PROJECT_ID, 'Controlling Performance Unit','C'),
  NULL AS INVOICE_NUM,
  NULL AS INVOICE_DATE,
  NULL AS po_num,
  peia.non_labor_resource,
  TRIM(dr_gl_code_combinations.segment3),
  peia.cc_prvdr_organization_id,
  peia.cc_recvr_organization_id,
  TRIM(peia.attribute3),
  gl_ledgers.currency_code                                                                            AS func_currency_code,--USG
  (NVL(XAL.accounted_dr, 0)                                              - NVL(XAL.accounted_cr, 0))  AS FUNC_BURDENED_COST,--USG f_burden
  DECODE ( peia.system_linkage_function ,'USG' ,NVL(XAL.accounted_dr, 0) - NVL(XAL.accounted_cr, 0) ) AS FUNC_RAW_COST,     --USG f_Rawcost
  pa_tasks.customer_id,
  xal.ae_line_num,
  'LABOR_COST' AS source_type,
  xal.ae_header_id,
  (
  CASE
    WHEN PEIA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE LIKE '__ STAFF WS'
    THEN 'Y'
    ELSE 'N'
  END) AS WORKSHARE_FLAG,
  (
  CASE
    WHEN PEIA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE LIKE '__ STAFF WS'
    THEN (
      CASE
        WHEN NVL(xal.entered_dr,0) <> 0
        THEN xal.entered_dr
        ELSE -(NVL(xal.entered_cr,0))
      END)
    ELSE 0
  END) AS PRDR_DENOM_RAW_COST,
  0    AS PRDR_DENOM_BURDENED_COST,
  (
  CASE
    WHEN PEIA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE LIKE '__ STAFF WS'
    THEN (
      CASE
        WHEN NVL(xal.accounted_dr,0) <> 0
        THEN xal.accounted_dr
        ELSE -(NVL(xal.accounted_cr,0))
      END)
    ELSE 0
  END) AS PRDR_FUNC_RAW_COST,
  (
  CASE
    WHEN PEIA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE LIKE '__ STAFF WS'
    THEN (
      CASE
        WHEN NVL(xal.accounted_dr,0) <> 0
        THEN xal.accounted_dr
        ELSE -(NVL(xal.accounted_cr,0))
      END)
    ELSE 0
  END) * NVL(jeg_get_corporate_rate(pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.acct_currency_code,pa_projects_all.projfunc_currency_code,xal.accounting_date),0) AS PRDR_PROJFUNC_RAW_COST,
  (
  CASE
    WHEN PEIA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE LIKE '__ STAFF WS'
    THEN (
      CASE
        WHEN NVL(xal.accounted_dr,0) <> 0
        THEN xal.accounted_dr
        ELSE -(NVL(xal.accounted_cr,0))
      END)
    ELSE 0
  END) * NVL(jeg_get_corporate_rate(pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.acct_currency_code,pa_projects_all.project_currency_code,xal.accounting_date),0) AS PRDR_PROJ_RAW_COST,
  0                                                                                                                                                 AS PRDR_FUNC_BURDENED_COST,
  0                                                                                                                                                 AS PRDR_PROJFUNC_BURDENED_COST,
  0                                                                                                                                                 AS PRDR_PROJ_BURDENED_COST,
  (
  CASE
    WHEN PEIA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE LIKE '__ STAFF WS'
    THEN PA_COST_DISTRIBUTION_LINES_ALL.ACCT_CURRENCY_CODE
    ELSE NULL
  END) AS PRDR_ACCT_CURR_CODE ,
  NULL AS non_billable_code1 -- Classfication code P
  ,
  NULL AS non_billable_code2 -- Classfication code R
  ,
  NULL AS non_billable_code3 -- Classfication code W
  ,
  NULL AS non_billable_code4 -- Classfication code C
  ,
  NULL AS non_billable_code5 -- Classfication code X
  ,
  0 AS NB1_Hours -- Classfication Hours P
  ,
  0 AS NB2_Hours -- Classfication Hours R
  ,

FROM xla_distribution_links XDL ,

    WHEN peia.system_linkage_function IN ('OT','ST')
    THEN 'PEOPLE'

    THEN 'MATERIAL_ITEMS'
    WHEN peia.SYSTEM_LINKAGE_FUNCTION = 'VI'
    AND peia.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID       IS NOT NULL
    THEN 'MATERIAL_ITEMS'
    WHEN peia.SYSTEM_LINKAGE_FUNCTION        = 'VI'
    AND peia.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID              IS NULL
    AND NVL(LT.ORDER_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE,'NA') <> 'RATE'
    THEN 'FINANCIAL_ELEMENTS'
    WHEN peia.SYSTEM_LINKAGE_FUNCTION                  = 'VI'
    AND peia.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID                        IS NULL
    AND LT.ORDER_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE                      = 'RATE'
    AND PA_IMPLEMENTATIONS_ALL.XFACE_CWK_TIMECARDS_FLAG='Y'
    THEN 'PEOPLE'
    WHEN peia.SYSTEM_LINKAGE_FUNCTION                   = 'VI'
    AND peia.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID                         IS NULL
    AND LT.ORDER_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE                       = 'RATE'
    AND PA_IMPLEMENTATIONS_ALL.XFACE_CWK_TIMECARDS_FLAG = 'N'
    THEN 'FINANCIAL_ELEMENTS'
    WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'WIP'

    THEN 'PEOPLE'

    WHEN peia.system_linkage_function           = 'WIP'

    WHEN peia.system_linkage_function                  = 'USG'

        WHEN NVL(xal.accounted_dr,0) <> 0

 --AND XAL.ledger_id                                      = gl_ledgers.ledger_id -- commented by Palani 05/03/24

AND dr_gl_code_combinations.SEGMENT2 BETWEEN PACT.ACCOUNT_FROM(+) AND PACT.ACCOUNT_TO(+)

AND dr_gl_code_combinations.code_combination_id = pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.cr_code_combination_id

AND XAL.ACCOUNTING_DATE                      >= to_date('10/01/2016', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS')
